ratings.comment: Lots of information, super informative. Go to lecture!

Victor is very sweet, but the class moves through history quickly and it can be difficult so make sure not to let yourself fall behind. His lectures are a big part of the weekly quizzes. He's a good teacher and he knows what he's talking about.

Great professor with awesome slides and lecturing skills. Class was difficult enough to be engaging but still understandable. Lots of readings, however. Tests were super fair and easy. Definitely recommend taking 223 with him!
